notes: The file discharges the xy_family hypothesis for isogOneSub_negFrobenius unconditionally via a four-stage chain: K-AlgHom distribution over curve formulas, σ-commutation (Frobenius pullback = q-th power), curve-group-law identity (id−π translation-invariant for K-rational shifts), and Affine.Point.some.injEq extraction. The key export xy_family_isogOneSub_negFrobenius is used by PoleDivisorFallback.lean and PoleDivisor2Tor.lean; frobeniusW_KE and genericPoint_sub_frobeniusW_KE_apply are also consumed by GapSpines.lean and WallAGeometricRealization.lean. One declaration (map_negY_K_algHom) is dead code not referenced anywhere in the project.
